revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing misc last stuff

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024" to "qq"
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23462003564|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) -->
== Usage == This subtemplate is used to determine the section coloring in {{tl|Infobox religious building}}.
==Full list== {{hatnote|1=The list used in main documentation is [[Template:Infobox religious building/doc/religious affiliation|here]]}} {{Infobox religious building/color/testtable}}
==See also== * [[Template:Infobox religious building/doc/religious affiliation]] -- editor's table (for main /doc) * [[Template:Infobox religious building/color/testcases]] -- same table, with /color/sandbox color chceck added
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Color templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
